commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The family of the house of Levi apart, and their wives apart; the family of Shimei apart, and their wives apart; Nathan. Zorobabel was his descendant. Semei, the son of Gershom, 1 Paralipomenon vi. (Calmet) "From this tribe the doctors are chosen. Jerome) The pious of all ranks bewail the death of Christ, and the share which they had in it. (Haydock) He had done good to many; and therefore we may presume that many would grieve in every tribe. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
